烟花青色闪烁短尾迹（高）
烟花青色闪烁短尾迹（低）
烟花青色闪烁小爆裂（高）
烟花青色闪烁小爆裂（低）
烟花绿色闪烁平尾迹（高）
烟花绿色闪烁平尾迹（低）
烟花绿色闪烁大爆裂（高）
烟花绿色闪烁大爆裂（低）
烟花绿色闪烁长尾迹（高）
烟花绿色闪烁长尾迹（低）
烟花绿色闪烁短尾迹（高）
烟花绿色闪烁短尾迹（低）
烟花绿色闪烁小爆裂（高）
烟花绿色闪烁小爆裂（低）
烟花橙色闪烁平尾迹（高）
烟花橙色闪烁平尾迹（低）
烟花橙色闪烁大爆裂（高）
烟花橙色闪烁大爆裂（低）
烟花橙色闪烁长尾迹（高）
烟花橙色闪烁长尾迹（低）
烟花橙色闪烁短尾迹（高）
烟花橙色闪烁短尾迹（低）
烟花橙色闪烁小爆裂（高）
烟花橙色闪烁小爆裂（低）
烟花紫色闪烁平尾迹（高）
烟花紫色闪烁平尾迹（低）
烟花紫色闪烁大爆裂（高）
烟花紫色闪烁大爆裂（低）
烟花紫色闪烁长尾迹（高）
烟花紫色闪烁长尾迹（低）
烟花紫色闪烁短尾迹（高）
烟花紫色闪烁短尾迹（低）
烟花紫色闪烁小爆裂（高）
烟花紫色闪烁小爆裂（低）
烟花红色闪烁平尾迹（高）
烟花红色闪烁平尾迹（低）
烟花红色闪烁大爆裂（高）
烟花红色闪烁大爆裂（低）
烟花红色闪烁长尾迹（高）
烟花红色闪烁长尾迹（低）
烟花红色闪烁短尾迹（高）
烟花红色闪烁短尾迹（低）
烟花红色闪烁小爆裂（高）
烟花红色闪烁小爆裂（低）
烟花白色闪烁平尾迹（高）
烟花白色闪烁平尾迹（低）
烟花白色闪烁大爆裂（高）
烟花白色闪烁大爆裂（低）
烟花白色闪烁长尾迹（高）
烟花白色闪烁长尾迹（低）
烟花白色闪烁短尾迹（高）
烟花白色闪烁短尾迹（低）
烟花白色闪烁小爆裂（高）
烟花白色闪烁小爆裂（低）
烟花黄色闪烁平尾迹（高）
烟花黄色闪烁平尾迹（低）
烟花黄色闪烁大爆裂（高）
烟花黄色闪烁大爆裂（低）
烟花黄色闪烁长尾迹（高）
烟花黄色闪烁长尾迹（低）
烟花黄色闪烁短尾迹（高）
烟花黄色闪烁短尾迹（低）
烟花黄色闪烁小爆裂（高）
烟花黄色闪烁小爆裂（低）

Entry.Original: Fireworks burst in the sky creating beautiful patterns. They can be launched by hand, but it's better to launch them en masse using the dispenser. And better still to wire multiple dispensers with electricity and create a beautiful, programmed fireworks display. Fireworks come in 8 colors, 8 shapes, 2 altitude modes (low and high). Additionally each firework can be made to flicker. Color and shape of the head determines color and shape of the burst. Thick shafts burst high, narrow shafts burst low. Red stabilizers indicate flickering.
Entry.Translation: 烟花在空中爆裂，形成美丽的图案。可以手动发射，但最好使用发射器集体发射。更妙的是用电线连接多个发射器，创建美丽的编程烟花表演。烟花有8种颜色、8种形状、2种高度模式（低和高）。此外，每个烟花都可以闪烁。头部的颜色和形状决定爆裂的颜色和形状。粗杆爆裂高，细杆爆裂低。红色稳定器表示闪烁。

Entry.Original: Flour is white powder obtained by crushing grains of rye. Mix it with water to make dough.
Entry.Translation: 面粉是通过压碎黑麦粒获得的白色粉末。与水混合制成面团。

Entry.Original: Fur can be obtained by killing furry animals such as bears. It is a strong material with good insulating properties, perfect for making winter clothes.
Entry.Translation: 毛皮可通过杀死有毛皮的动物（如熊）获得。它是一种坚固且具有良好隔热性能的材料，非常适合制作冬衣。

Entry.Original: Gates are used to make entrances to fenced areas. They can be opened and closed by clicking on them. When connected to a copper wire, gates will open or close on the rising edge of electric signal. Animals can't jump a fence gate. Can be painted.
Entry.Translation: 门用于在栅栏区域制作入口。可以通过点击打开和关闭。当连接到铜线时，门会在电信号上升沿打开或关闭。动物无法跳过栅栏门。可染色。

Entry.Original: Germanium crystal is a crystal of pure electronic-grade germanium. It is a semiconductor and can be used to make electronic logic gates.
Entry.Translation: 锗晶体是纯电子级锗的晶体。它是一种半导体，可用于制造电子逻辑门。

Entry.Original: Germanium ore are veins of germanium oxide embedded in basalt rock. Gains germanium ore blocks when mined.
Entry.Translation: 锗矿石是嵌入玄武岩中的氧化锗矿脉。开采时获得锗矿石块。

Entry.Original: Gives experience when collected by a player
Entry.Translation: 被玩家收集时给予经验

Entry.Original: Granite is a tough grey stone that fills the majority of underground world and makes mountains stand tall. Sometimes contains veins of coal, and, often deeper, copper. When harvested, turns into cobblestone, which can in turn be smelted back into pure granite. Can be painted.
Entry.Translation: 花岗岩是一种坚硬的灰色石头，填充了地下世界的大部分，并使山脉屹立。有时含有煤脉，通常更深含有铜。收获时变成圆石，圆石又可以熔炼回纯花岗岩。可染色。

Entry.Original: Grass grows on dirt blocks when there is enough sunlight available. When conditions are right, various flowers, tall grass blades and vegetables will grow on it. Grass is easily destroyed by covering it with something heavy and takes a long time to regrow.
Entry.Translation: 当有足够阳光时，草会在泥土上生长。当条件合适时，各种花、高草和蔬菜会在上面生长。草很容易被重物覆盖而破坏，并且需要很长时间才能重新生长。

Entry.Original: Grass trap is a deception device that resembles grass but collapses when something heavy stands on it. It's used for concealing traps so that an animal, unwary of the trap will walk on it and fall into the pit. It can only be crafted from oak leaves, no other leaves will work.
Entry.Translation: 草陷阱是一种类似草的欺骗装置，但当重物站在上面时会塌陷。用于隐藏陷阱，使动物不慎踩上去掉进坑里。只能用橡树叶制作，其他叶子不行。

Entry.Original: Gravel is an aggregate of fine stones. Caches of gravel are often found underground, and it sometimes covers beaches. It is then known under the name of shingle. Gravel is a loose material that will collapse when tunnelled under, and may easily bury the unwary, so be careful. It is the best source of rocks for throwing.
Entry.Translation: 沙砾是细石的集合体。地下常发现沙砾储藏，有时覆盖海滩。那时被称为卵石。沙砾是一种松散材料，在下方挖掘时会坍塌，容易掩埋不小心的玩家，所以要小心。它是投掷用石头的最佳来源。

Entry.Original: Gravestone marks a final resting place of past inhabitant of this land.
Entry.Translation: 墓碑标志着这片土地过去居民的最后安息之地。

Entry.Original: Gunpowder keg is a sealed, wooden container filled with gunpowder, with a short fuse attached on the top. The fuse can be lit with a match or initiated electrically. The keg will explode after several seconds with devastating force, destroying blocks and killing any creatures within the blast range. Certain blocks, such as stone, iron and diamond are more resilient to explosions than others. Use detonators to cause an instantaneous explosion without fuse delay.
Entry.Translation: 火药桶是一个密封的木制容器，内装火药，顶部附有短引信。可以用火柴点燃或用电触发。桶会在几秒钟后以 devastating 的力量爆炸，摧毁爆炸范围内的方块并杀死所有生物。某些方块，如石头、铁和钻石，比其他方块更能抵抗爆炸。使用雷管可引发瞬间爆炸，无需引信延迟。

Entry.Original: Hammer is used to create furniture from blocks placed in the world.
Entry.Translation: 锤子用于从世界中的方块创建家具。

Entry.Original: Heavy chest armor made of copper. Average protection. Weak insulation. Slows you down.
Entry.Translation: 铜制重型胸甲。平均保护。隔热差。降低速度。

Entry.Original: Heavy chest armor made of iron. Good protection. Weak insulation. Slows you down.
Entry.Translation: 铁制重型胸甲。良好保护。隔热差。降低速度。

Entry.Original: Heavy helmet made of copper. Average protection. Weak insulation.
Entry.Translation: 铜制重型头盔。平均保护。隔热差。

Entry.Original: Heavy helmet made of iron. Good protection. Weak insulation.
Entry.Translation: 铁制重型头盔。良好保护。隔热差。

Entry.Original: Heavy leg plates made of copper. Average protection. Weak insulation. Slows you down.
Entry.Translation: 铜制重型护腿。平均保护。隔热差。降低速度。

Entry.Original: Heavy leg plates made of iron. Good protection. Weak insulation. Slows you down.
Entry.Translation: 铁制重型护腿。良好保护。隔热差。降低速度。

Entry.Original: Heavy protective boots made of copper. Average protection. Weak insulation.
Entry.Translation: 铜制重型保护靴。平均保护。隔热差。

Entry.Original: Heavy protective boots made of iron. Good protection. Weak insulation.
Entry.Translation: 铁制重型保护靴。良好保护。隔热差。

Entry.Original: Hygrometer displays humidity of the surrounding area. It is an important tool when planting trees. All trees need a lot of humidity to grow. When a tree is planted an area which is too dry, the sapling will wilt. It is also an electric element that outputs analog signal corresponding to the surrounding humidity.
Entry.Translation: 湿度计显示周围区域的湿度。它是种植树木时的重要工具。所有树木都需要大量湿度才能生长。当树木种植在太干燥的区域时，树苗会枯萎。它也是一个电动元件，输出与周围湿度相对应的模拟信号。

Entry.Original: Incendiary keg is a gunpowder keg with added incendiary materials. It is weaker than regular gunpowder keg but its debris sets flammable objects on fire. Do not use near forests!
Entry.Translation: 燃烧桶是添加了燃烧材料的火药桶。它比普通火药桶弱，但其碎片会点燃易燃物品。请勿在森林附近使用！

Entry.Original: Iron ore is a vein of iron oxide embedded in basalt rock. Gains iron ore chunks when mined. Further processing in the furnace is required to extract pure iron from the oxide.
Entry.Translation: 铁矿石是嵌入玄武岩中的氧化铁矿脉。开采时获得铁矿石碎块。需要进一步在熔炉中加工才能从氧化物中提取纯铁。

Entry.Original: Ivy is a plant that grows and clings to vertical surfaces. It does not require much light to stay alive, but needs a humid and warm climate.
Entry.Translation: 常春藤是一种生长并依附在垂直表面的植物。它不需要太多光照就能存活，但需要潮湿温暖的气候。

Entry.Original: Jack O'Lanterns are usually carved from ripe pumpkins during Halloween. They emit weak light.
Entry.Translation: 南瓜灯通常在万圣节用成熟的南瓜雕刻而成。它们发出微弱的光。

Entry.Original: Kelp is undersea plant anchored to the sea bottom that reaches up to get access to sunlight. Watch out when swimming because you can get entangled and drown.
Entry.Translation: 海带是锚定在海底的水下植物，向上延伸以获得阳光。游泳时要小心，因为可能会被缠住而溺水。

Entry.Original: Ladders are made from sticks or rods. They make it easy to climb and descend tall walls safely. It's safest to climb both up and down facing the wall. That means you have to approach backwards when entering the ladder from the top.
Entry.Translation: 梯子由棍棒或杆制成。它们使安全攀爬和下降高墙变得容易。面朝墙壁上下攀爬最安全。这意味着从顶部进入梯子时必须倒着接近。

Entry.Original: Leather can be obtained by killing certain animals. It is a versatile material that can be used as a extremely durable, wear and tear resistant and waterproof fabric. It is also used to make saddles.
Entry.Translation: 皮革可以通过杀死某些动物获得。它是一种多用途材料，可用作极其耐用、耐磨和防水的织物。它也用于制作马鞍。

Entry.Original: Leaves which fell from a tree in the autumn
Entry.Translation: 秋天从树上落下的叶子

Entry.Original: Light Gray dyed Old Tank Top
Light iron armor that can be worn under outer clothes and does not slow you down. Good protection. No insulation.
Entry.Translation: 轻铁护甲，可穿在外衣下面，不会降低速度。良好保护。无隔热。

Entry.Original: Limestone is a brittle whitish stone occasionally found near the surface close to water bodies. It can be easily quarried with a pickaxe, and because of its brittleness even with bare hands. It can be used for making pigments and marble.
Entry.Translation: 石灰石是一种易碎的白色石头，偶尔在地表附近靠近水体处发现。可以用镐轻松开采，由于其易碎性，甚至可以用手。可用于制作颜料和大理石。

Entry.Original: Logic AND gate. Has two inputs on the sides and one output. The output is 1 when both inputs are 1, otherwise it is 0. Can be placed on any surface and rotated to desired orientation.
Entry.Translation: 逻辑与门。侧面有两个输入，一个输出。当两个输入都为1时输出为1，否则为0。可放置在任何表面上并旋转到所需方向。

Entry.Original: Logic NAND gate. Has two inputs on the sides and one output. The output is 0 when both inputs are 1, otherwise it is 1. Can be placed on any surface and rotated to desired orientation.
Entry.Translation: 逻辑与非门。侧面有两个输入，一个输出。当两个输入都为1时输出为0，否则为1。可放置在任何表面上并旋转到所需方向。

Entry.Original: Logic NOR gate. Has two inputs on the sides and one output. The output is 0 when any of the inputs is 1, otherwise it is 1. Can be placed on any surface and rotated to desired orientation.
Entry.Translation: 逻辑或非门。侧面有两个输入，一个输出。当任意输入为1时输出为0，否则为1。可放置在任何表面上并旋转到所需方向。

Entry.Original: Logic NOT gate. Has one input and one output. Inverts the electric signal coming on the input. The output is 1 when input is 0, otherwise it is 0. Can be placed on any surface and rotated to desired orientation.
Entry.Translation: 逻辑非门。有一个输入和一个输出。反转输入的电信号。当输入为0时输出为1，否则为0。可放置在任何表面上并旋转到所需方向。

Entry.Original: Logic OR gate. Has two inputs on the sides and one output. The output is 1 when any of the inputs is 1, otherwise it is 0. Can be placed on any surface and rotated to desired orientation.
Entry.Translation: 逻辑或门。侧面有两个输入，一个输出。当任意输入为1时输出为1，否则为0。可放置在任何表面上并旋转到所需方向。

Entry.Original: Logic SR latch. Can be used as a memory element holding a single bit. Has three inputs (S, R and clock), and one output. A signal on S input sets the state to 1. A signal on R input resets the state to 0. Output always indicates the current state of the latch. Can work in synchronous or asynchronous mode, depending on whether clock input is connected. In synchronous mode the states of S and R inputs are read only during a rising edge on the clock input. Can be placed on any surface and rotated to desired orientation.
Entry.Translation: 逻辑SR锁存器。可用作存储单个位的内存元件。有三个输入（S、R和时钟）和一个输出。S输入信号将状态设为1。R输入信号将状态复位为0。输出始终指示锁存器的当前状态。可以工作在同步或异步模式，取决于时钟输入是否连接。在同步模式下，S和R输入的状态仅在时钟输入的上升沿读取。可放置在任何表面上并旋转到所需方向。

Entry.Original: Logic XOR gate. Has two inputs on the sides and one output. The output is 1 when exactly one of the inputs is 1, otherwise it is 0. Can be placed on any surface and rotated to desired orientation.
Entry.Translation: 逻辑异或门。侧面有两个输入，一个输出。当恰好一个输入为1时输出为1，否则为0。可放置在任何表面上并旋转到所需方向。

Entry.Original: Long Johns made of canvas. Can be dyed. Almost no protection. Good insulation.
Entry.Translation: 帆布长内衣。可染色。几乎没有保护。良好隔热。

Entry.Original: Long boots made of leather. Good protection. Good insulation. Makes your horse run faster.
Entry.Translation: 长皮靴。良好保护。良好隔热。让你的马跑得更快。

Entry.Original: Long pants made of canvas. Can be dyed. Almost no protection. Weak insulation.
Entry.Translation: 帆布长裤。可染色。几乎没有保护。隔热差。

Entry.Original: Long pants made of leather. Can be dyed. Weak protection. Some insulation.
Entry.Translation: 皮革长裤。可染色。弱保护。一定隔热。

Entry.Original: Long-sleeved cotton shirt. Can be dyed. Almost no protection. Weak insulation.
Entry.Translation: 长袖棉衬衫。可染色。几乎没有保护。隔热差。

Entry.Original: Magnets attract compass needle allowing you to find direction home while out in the wild. Don't forget to place one close to your house! The compass will show direction to the nearest magnet, or to spawn location if there are no magnets. You can only place a limited number of magnets in the world.
Entry.Translation: 磁铁吸引指南针指针，让你在野外找到回家的方向。别忘了在房子附近放一个！指南针会指向最近的磁铁，如果没有磁铁则指向出生点。你只能在世界中放置有限数量的磁铁。

Entry.Original: Makeshift chest armor made of wooden sticks and string. Some protection. No insulation.
Entry.Translation: 用木棍和绳子制作的临时胸甲。一定保护。无隔热。

Entry.Original: Makeshift legs armor made of wooden sticks and string. Some protection. No insulation.
Entry.Translation: 用木棍和绳子制作的临时腿甲。一定保护。无隔热。

Entry.Original: Mimosa leaves grow on mimosa trees and can be used to obtain mimosa saplings. They will burn and can be used as a cheap fuel. When placed away from the trunk, they will decay.
Entry.Translation: 合欢树叶长在合欢树上，可用于获得合欢树苗。它们会燃烧，可用作廉价燃料。当放置在远离树干的地方时，会腐烂。

Entry.Original: Mimosa wood grows in trunks of mimosa trees, which grow in dry areas. It can be crafted into planks, which are a versatile building and crafting material. It can also be used as a fuel in the furnace. To replant trees you need to obtain saplings from the leaves.
Entry.Translation: 合欢木长在合欢树的树干中，合欢树生长在干燥地区。它可以合成为木板，一种多功能的建筑和合成材料。也可用作熔炉的燃料。要重新种植树木，你需要从树叶中获得树苗。

Entry.Original: No sleeves cotton shirt. Can be dyed. Almost no protection. Weak insulation.
Entry.Translation: 无袖棉衬衫。可染色。几乎没有保护。隔热差。

Entry.Original: Oak leaves grow on oak trees and can be used to obtain oak saplings. They will burn and can be used as a cheap fuel. When placed away from the trunk, they will decay. Grass traps that can deceive both man and a beast can be crafted from these leaves.
Entry.Translation: 橡树叶长在橡树上，可用于获得橡树苗。它们会燃烧，可用作廉价燃料。当放置在远离树干的地方时，会腐烂。用这些叶子可以制作能欺骗人和野兽的草陷阱。

Entry.Original: Oak wood grows in trunks of oak trees, which grow in warm and humid areas. It can be crafted into planks, which are a versatile building and crafting material. It can also be used as a fuel in the furnace. To replant trees you need to obtain saplings from the leaves.
Entry.Translation: 橡木长在橡树的树干中，橡树生长在温暖潮湿地区。它可以合成为木板，一种多功能的建筑和合成材料。也可用作熔炉的燃料。要重新种植树木，你需要从树叶中获得树苗。

Entry.Original: Old hat you wore when being abandoned on this land. Can be dyed. Almost no protection. Weak insulation.
Entry.Translation: 你被遗弃在这片土地上时戴的旧帽子。可染色。几乎没有保护。隔热差。

Entry.Original: Old pants you wore when being abandoned on this land. Can be dyed. Almost no protection. Weak insulation.
Entry.Translation: 你被遗弃在这片土地上时穿的旧裤子。可染色。几乎没有保护。隔热差。

Entry.Original: Old shirt you wore when being abandoned on this land. Can be dyed. Almost no protection. Weak insulation.
Entry.Translation: 你被遗弃在这片土地上时穿的旧衬衫。可染色。几乎没有保护。隔热差。

Entry.Original: Old tank top you wore when being abandoned on this land. Can be dyed. Almost no protection. Weak insulation.
Entry.Translation: 你被遗弃在这片土地上时穿的旧背心。可染色。几乎没有保护。隔热差。

Entry.Original: Pale Blue dyed Old Tank Top
Pale Cyan dyed Old Tank Top
Pale Green dyed Old Tank Top

Pickaxes are tools for quarrying hard blocks, such as stone or ice. They greatly speed up the quarrying process, but eventually they will get damaged and fail. Pickaxes made of better materials last longer and quarry faster.
Entry.Translation: 镐是用于开采硬方块（如石头或冰）的工具。它们大大加快了开采过程，但最终会损坏失效。更好材料制成的镐更耐用，开采更快。

Entry.Original: Pigment is the main constituent of paints. It can be obtained by firing limestone in the furnace until it turns to white powder. To make white paint, boil the pigment in water using the furnace.
Entry.Translation: 颜料是油漆的主要成分。可以通过在熔炉中烧制石灰石直到变成白色粉末获得。要制作白漆，请在熔炉中将颜料在水中煮沸。

Entry.Original: Pistons can be used to push and pull blocks. The extension of piston is controlled by voltage applied to it. 0.8V will make piston extend to one block, 0.9V to two etc. 1.5V will extend a piston to a maximum of 8 blocks. Pistons can also be edited to limit the maximum extension to lower values. If the piston is a pull piston, it will also pull blocks back when retracting. If the piston is a strict pull piston, it will not retract unless it is pulling back enough blocks. Number of pulled blocks can be adjusted by editing up to a maximum of 8.
Entry.Translation: 活塞可用于推动和拉动方块。活塞的伸展由施加在其上的电压控制。0.8V使活塞伸展一个方块，0.9V两个，依此类推。1.5V使活塞最多伸展8个方块。活塞也可以通过编辑限制最大伸展为较低的值。如果活塞是拉式活塞，它在收缩时也会拉回方块。如果活塞是严格拉式活塞，它除非拉回足够数量的方块，否则不会收缩。拉回方块的数量可以通过编辑调整，最多8个。

Entry.Original: Planks are a versatile construction material that can be obtained by cutting wood blocks into pieces. A multitude of useful objects, such as a workbench or a chest can be made from planks. Planks are flammable and can be used as a fuel in the furnace. Can be painted.
Entry.Translation: 木板是一种多功能的建筑材料，可以通过将木头块切割成碎片获得。许多有用的物品，如工作台或箱子，都可以用木板制作。木板易燃，可用作熔炉的燃料。可染色。

Entry.Original: Plant rye on tilled, moist and fertilized soil to obtain full grown plants. Harvesting the plants will yield large number of rye seeds. Rye also grows naturally in form or wild rye. You can obtain wild seeds by harvesting it.
Entry.Translation: 在耕地、湿润且施肥的土壤上种植黑麦，可获得完全生长的植物。收获植物将产生大量黑麦种子。黑麦也以野生黑麦的形式自然生长。你可以通过收获它获得野生种子。

Entry.Original: Poplar leaves grow on poplar trees and can be used to obtain poplar saplings. They will burn and can be used as a cheap fuel. When placed away from the trunk, they will decay.
Entry.Translation: 杨树叶长在杨树上，可用于获得杨树苗。它们会燃烧，可用作廉价燃料。当放置在远离树干的地方时，会腐烂。

Entry.Original: Poplar wood grows in trunks of poplar trees, which grow in temperate areas. It can be crafted into planks, which are a versatile building and crafting material. It can also be used as a fuel in the furnace. To replant trees you need to obtain saplings from the leaves.
Entry.Translation: 杨木长在杨树的树干中，杨树生长在温带地区。它可以合成为木板，一种多功能的建筑和合成材料。也可用作熔炉的燃料。要重新种植树木，你需要从树叶中获得树苗。

Entry.Original: Pumpkin soup, tasty and nutritious. Can be made by cooking raw pumpkin in a bucket of water.
Entry.Translation: 南瓜汤，美味且营养。可以通过在一桶水中烹饪生南瓜制作。

Entry.Original: Pumpkins are large, orange vegetables that grow in groups of 5 to 10 plants. When collected, they can be eaten, cooked into pumpkin soup or crafted into Jack O'Lanterns.
Entry.Translation: 南瓜是一种大的橙色蔬菜，以5到10株一组生长。收获后可以食用、煮成南瓜汤或制作成南瓜灯。

Entry.Original: Purple flowers randomly grow on well lit and humid grass blocks. Can be used as a decorative plant and contains purple pigment that makes magenta paint
Entry.Translation: 紫色花随机生长在光线充足且湿润的草块上。可用作装饰植物，并含有可制作洋红色油漆的紫色颜料

Entry.Original: Rakes are tools for turning dirt into soil. After the soil has been created by a rake, it is ready to be planted. The rake will eventually get damaged and fail. Rakes made of better materials last longer.
Entry.Translation: 耙子是将泥土变成土壤的工具。耙子制造出土壤后，就可以种植了。耙子最终会损坏失效。更好材料制成的耙子更耐用。

Entry.Original: Red flowers randomly grow on well lit and humid grass blocks. Can be used as a decorative plant.
Entry.Translation: 红花随机生长在光线充足且湿润的草块上。可用作装饰植物。

Entry.Original: Rods are made by forging iron into shape. They are useful for making fences, doors and other things.
Entry.Translation: 杆是通过锻造铁成形的。它们可用于制作栅栏、门和其他东西。

Entry.Original: Rotten bird meat. Do not eat.
Rotten pumpkin soup, do not eat.
Entry.Translation: 腐烂的南瓜汤，请勿食用。

Entry.Original: Saddle makes it possible to ride horses and other animals. A horse without a saddle will quickly dump the rider and run away.
Entry.Translation: 马鞍使得骑乘马和其他动物成为可能。没有马鞍的马会很快甩掉骑手并跑开。

Entry.Original: Saltpeter ore is a vein of potassium nitrate embedded in sandstone rock. Gains saltpeter chunks when mined. Saltpeter can be used to make explosives.
Entry.Translation: 硝石矿石是嵌入砂岩中的硝酸钾矿脉。开采时获得硝石块。硝石可用于制造炸药。

Entry.Original: Sand is a yellowish loose material that covers desert areas and beaches. Be careful because sand will collapse when tunnelled under. It is most commonly used to make glass. Cacti will often grow on it in dry and hot climates.
Entry.Translation: 沙子是一种淡黄色的松散材料，覆盖沙漠地区和海滩。小心，因为沙子在下方挖掘时会坍塌。它最常用于制造玻璃。在干燥炎热的气候下，仙人掌常在其上生长。

Entry.Original: Sandals made of leather. Can be dyed. Some protection. Some insulation.
Entry.Translation: 皮革制成的凉鞋。可染色。一定保护。一定隔热。

Entry.Original: Saplings are used to plant trees. You can obtain them by crafting from the leaves of trees. When planting, be careful to place the saplings in a well lit place, full of moisture and of correct temperature. Use hygrometer and thermometer to measure these quantities. Oaks like it warm, birches moderately cool and spruces cold. All trees need a lot of humidity. If you plant a sapling in a wrong spot, it will wilt into a dry bush.
Entry.Translation: 树苗用于种植树木。你可以通过用树叶合成获得它们。种植时，注意将树苗放置在光线充足、湿度高且温度适宜的地方。使用湿度计和温度计测量这些量。橡树喜欢温暖，白桦树 moderately cool，云杉寒冷。所有树木都需要大量湿度。如果树苗种植在错误的地点，它会枯萎变成干灌木。

Entry.Original: Sea urchins are small, spiny animals that attach themselves to the sea floor and make a living by filtering nutrients from seawater. They are edible but not very tasty or nutritious.
Entry.Translation: 海胆是小型的带刺动物，附着在海床上，通过过滤海水中的营养物质为生。它们可食用，但不太美味或营养。

Entry.Original: Seagrass is undersea plant anchored to the sea bottom that reaches up to get access to sunlight. Watch out when swimming because you can get entangled and drown.
Entry.Translation: 海草是锚定在海底的水下植物，向上延伸以获得阳光。游泳时要小心，因为可能会被缠住而溺水。

Entry.Original: Seeds are used to plant various types of plants, such as grass, flowers and rye. Some plants need well tilled, moist and fertilized soil to grow properly. Otherwise their growth will be stunted and they will not reach full size.
Entry.Translation: 种子用于种植各种类型的植物，如草、花和黑麦。有些植物需要精心耕种、湿润且施肥的土壤才能正常生长。否则它们的生长会受阻，无法达到完全大小。

Entry.Original: Short pants made of canvas. Can be dyed. Almost no protection. Weak insulation.
Entry.Translation: 帆布短裤。可染色。几乎没有保护。隔热差。

Entry.Original: Short-sleeved cotton shirt. Can be dyed. Almost no protection. Weak insulation.
Entry.Translation: 短袖棉衬衫。可染色。几乎没有保护。隔热差。

Entry.Original: Shovels are tools for digging blocks made of loose material, such as sand or gravel. They greatly speed up the digging process, but eventually they will get damaged and fail. Shovels made of better materials last longer and dig faster.
Entry.Translation: 锹是用于挖掘松散材料（如沙子或沙砾）方块的工具。它们大大加快了挖掘过程，但最终会损坏失效。更好材料制成的锹更耐用，挖掘更快。

Entry.Original: Signs can contain up to 4 lines of black or colored text. They can be affixed to a vertical surface, placed on a post anchored in the ground, or hung from the ceiling. A sign can be made to act as an internet link by specifying a URL (URLs only work in Adventure mode). When attached to a copper wire, the sign message will be displayed on the screen on the rising edge of an electric signal. Use \ (backslash) to continue message in the same line. Can be painted.
Entry.Translation: 告示牌可以包含最多4行黑色或彩色文本。它们可以固定在垂直表面、放置在地面柱子或悬挂在天花板上。通过指定URL，告示牌可以充当互联网链接（URL仅在冒险模式中有效）。当连接到铜线时，告示牌消息会在电信号上升沿显示在屏幕上。使用反斜杠\在同一行继续消息。可染色。

Entry.Original: Slabs are half-height blocks, which can be crafted from a variety of different materials. They can be used to cover floors at a cheaper cost than full size blocks. They can also be used to make long stairs, where each unit of length moves one up by a half unit of height. Slabs can also be affixed to the ceilings. Can be painted.
Entry.Translation: 台阶是半高的方块，可以由多种不同材料制成。它们可以以比全尺寸方块更便宜的成本覆盖地板。它们也可用于制作长楼梯，每单位长度上升半单位高度。台阶也可以固定在天花板上。可染色。

Entry.Original: Snowballs are made by compacting snow in one's hands. Soft and light, they can be thrown without risk of inflicting damage on the surroundings or injuries in the bystanders. Perfect for fun fights. Be careful when throwing them at dangerous animals, they will usually take a dim view of that.
Entry.Translation: 雪球是通过在手中压实雪制成的。柔软轻盈，投掷时不会对周围环境造成破坏或伤害旁观者。非常适合有趣的战斗。小心向危险动物投掷雪球，它们通常对此不太友好。

Entry.Original: Socks made of canvas. Can be dyed. Almost no protection. Good insulation.
Entry.Translation: 帆布袜子。可染色。几乎没有保护。良好隔热。

Entry.Original: Soil is dirt that has been made suitable for cultivation by using a rake. It can be easily damaged by walking or jumping on it. Soil can be fertilized by sprinkling saltpeter on it, plants will grow faster and slowly use up the fertilizer. Soil that is near water will become moist, making plants grow even faster. Rotten food will eventually turn into compost, which can be used in place of fertilized soil to grow plants just as quickly.
Entry.Translation: 土壤是使用耙子使其适合耕种的泥土。在上面行走或跳跃很容易破坏它。土壤可以通过撒硝石来施肥，植物会生长得更快，并慢慢消耗肥料。靠近水边的土壤会变得湿润，使植物生长得更快。腐烂的食物最终会变成堆肥，可以用来代替施肥的土壤，植物生长速度同样快。

Entry.Original: Spawner egg. Bird eggs are occasionally laid by adult birds. If you look carefully, you may find and eat them. Cooking an egg will increase its nutritional value. Non-bird eggs are available in creative mode only and can be used to spawn all other animals. To spawn an animal in creative mode, throw the egg against a hard surface to smash it. Spawner eggs of some exotic animals are unavailable even in creative mode.
Entry.Translation: 生成蛋。鸟蛋偶尔由成年鸟产下。如果仔细寻找，可能会发现并食用它们。烹饪蛋会增加其营养价值。非鸟蛋仅在创造模式中可用，可用于生成所有其他动物。要在创造模式下生成动物，将蛋扔向坚硬表面以打碎它。即使是在创造模式下，某些 exotic 动物的生成蛋也是不可用的。

Entry.Original: Spruce leaves grow on spruce trees and can be used to obtain spruce saplings. They will burn and can be used as a cheap fuel. When placed away from the trunk, they will decay. During Christmas time, a Christmas Tree can be crafted from them.
Entry.Translation: 云杉树叶长在云杉树上，可用于获得云杉树苗。它们会燃烧，可用作廉价燃料。当放置在远离树干的地方时，会腐烂。圣诞节期间，可以用它们制作圣诞树。

Entry.Original: Spruce wood grows in trunks of spruce trees, which grow in cool areas. It can be crafted into planks, which are a versatile building and crafting material. It can also be used as a fuel in the furnace. To replant trees you need to obtain saplings from the leaves.
Entry.Translation: 云杉木长在云杉树的树干中，云杉树生长在凉爽地区。它可以合成为木板，一种多功能的建筑和合成材料。也可用作熔炉的燃料。要重新种植树木，你需要从树叶中获得树苗。

Entry.Original: Stairs make it easy to climb slopes. You no longer need to constantly jump and climb vertical faces, instead you move faster, saving time and energy. Stairs can be crafted from various materials. Stairs can also be placed upside-down on the ceilings. Can be painted.
Entry.Translation: 楼梯使攀爬斜坡变得容易。你不再需要不断跳跃和攀爬垂直面，而是移动得更快，节省时间和精力。楼梯可以由多种材料制成。楼梯也可以倒置放置在天花板上。可染色。

Entry.Original: Starfish are underwater predators that move slowly over the sea bottom.
Entry.Translation: 海星是水下捕食者，在海底缓慢移动。

Entry.Original: Sticks are made by cutting wooden planks into pieces. They are a versatile building material used in construction of many items, such as torches, ladders or fences. They can also be used as a last resort weapon or tool, although their attack power is low.
Entry.Translation: 棍棒是通过将木板切割成碎片制成的。它们是一种多功能的建筑材料，用于建造许多物品，如火把、梯子或栅栏。它们也可以作为最后手段的武器或工具，尽管攻击力较低。

Entry.Original: Stone axe is a primitive tool that can equally be used for digging, cutting wood and quarrying rocks. It greatly speeds up the process, but it will quickly get damaged and fail. Stone axe is a poor melee weapon, make a club if you want to fight. You should progress to specialized tools made of metals.
Entry.Translation: 石斧是一种原始工具，同样可用于挖掘、砍伐木材和开采岩石。它大大加快了过程，但会迅速损坏失效。石斧是一种 poor 的近战武器，如果你想战斗，请制作一个棍棒。你应该进步到金属制成的 specialized 工具。

Entry.Original: Stone bricks can be made by binding together several stones of regular shape. They are a strong building material, very resilient to explosions and digging.
Entry.Translation: 石砖可以通过将几块规则形状的石头绑定在一起制成。它们是一种坚固的建筑材料，对爆炸和挖掘非常有韧性。

Entry.Original: Strings can be made from ivy.
Entry.Translation: 绳子可以用常春藤制作。

Entry.Original: Sulphur ore is a vein of elemental sulphur embedded in basalt rock. Gains sulphur chunks when mined. Sulphur can be used to make pyrotechnic substances, like gunpowder or matches.
Entry.Translation: 硫磺矿石是嵌入玄武岩中的元素硫矿脉。开采时获得硫磺块。硫磺可用于制造烟火物质，如火药或火柴。

Entry.Original: Sweater made of canvas. Can be dyed. Almost no protection. Good insulation.
Entry.Translation: 帆布毛衣。可染色。几乎没有保护。良好隔热。

Entry.Original: Tall grass randomly grows on well lit and humid grass blocks. You can obtain grass seeds from it, which can be used to plant more grass. Can be used as a decorative plant.
Entry.Translation: 高草随机生长在光线充足且湿润的草块上。你可以从中获得草种子，用于种植更多的草。可用作装饰植物。

Entry.Original: Tall spruce leaves grow on tall spruce trees and can be used to obtain tall spruce saplings. They will burn and can be used as a cheap fuel. When placed away from the trunk, they will decay.
Entry.Translation: 高云杉树叶长在高云杉树上，可用于获得高云杉树苗。它们会燃烧，可用作廉价燃料。当放置在远离树干的地方时，会腐烂。

Entry.Original: Thermometer displays ambient temperature. It is an important tool when planting trees. Oaks like it warm, birches moderately cool and spruces cold. Planting a tree in a wrong ambient temperature will cause the sapling to wilt. It is also an electric element that outputs analog signal corresponding to the surrounding temperature.
Entry.Translation: 温度计显示环境温度。它是种植树木时的重要工具。橡树喜欢温暖，白桦树 moderately cool，云杉寒冷。在错误的环境温度下种植树木会导致树苗枯萎。它也是一个电动元件，输出与周围温度相对应的模拟信号。

Entry.Original: Thick, warm coat made of fur. Weak protection. Good insulation. Slows you down.
Entry.Translation: 毛皮制成的厚实保暖大衣。弱保护。良好隔热。降低速度。

Entry.Original: Thick, warm hat made of fur. Weak protection. Good insulation.
Entry.Translation: 毛皮制成的厚实保暖帽子。弱保护。良好隔热。

Entry.Original: Thick, warm leggings made of fur. Weak protection. Good insulation. Slows you down.
Entry.Translation: 毛皮制成的厚实保暖护腿。弱保护。良好隔热。降低速度。

Entry.Original: Torch is a piece of flammable coal affixed to a wooden stick. When attached to a wall or placed on the floor, it emits light. It is the easiest and cheapest way to light interiors of buildings or underground corridors.
Entry.Translation: 火把是一块易燃的煤附着在木棍上。当附着在墙上或放在地板上时，它会发出光。这是照亮建筑物内部或地下走廊最简单最便宜的方法。

Entry.Original: Transparent block made by smelting sand in the furnace. Very useful for making windows and brightening up dark rooms. It is a very brittle material that will irrecoverably shatter when hit by something hard.
Entry.Translation: 通过在熔炉中熔炼沙子制成的透明方块。非常适合制作窗户和照亮暗室。它是一种非常易碎的材料，被硬物击中时会不可恢复地破碎。

Entry.Original: Trapdoors are used to make vertical entrances to buildings. They can be opened and closed by clicking on them. When connected to a copper wire, trapdoors will open or close on the rising edge of electric signal. Iron trapdoors cannot be operated manually when electrically connected. They can be placed normally or upside-down, depending whether they are attached to top or bottom side of the block. Upside-down trapdoors will stop falling blocks.
Entry.Translation: 活板门用于制作建筑物的垂直入口。可以通过点击打开和关闭。当连接到铜线时，活板门会在电信号上升沿打开或关闭。铁活板门在电气连接时无法手动操作。它们可以正常放置或倒置放置，取决于附着在方块的顶部还是底部。倒置的活板门会阻挡 falling 的方块。

Entry.Original: Whistle can be used to summon nearby steeds or drive cattle. Cattle will clump together and move away from the whistling person. You can control them by riding behind and directing them with controlled whistle blows from the sides. Whistle is also perfect for scaring birds.
Entry.Translation: 口哨可用于召唤附近的坐骑或驱赶牛群。牛会聚拢并远离吹口哨的人。你可以骑在后面，通过从侧面有控制地吹口哨来指挥它们。口哨也适合吓鸟。

Entry.Original: White flowers randomly grow on well lit and humid grass blocks. Can be used as a decorative plant.
Entry.Translation: 白花随机生长在光线充足且湿润的草块上。可用作装饰植物。

Entry.Original: Wicker lamp is a torch placed inside a wooden and wicker shade. It gives off slightly more light than the pure torch and is a nice, decorative item.
Entry.Translation: 柳条灯是将火把放在木质和柳条灯罩内。它发出的光比纯火把稍多，是一个漂亮的装饰品。

Entry.Original: Wooden spikes penetrate flesh. The spiked planks can be placed on the floor, on the walls and on the ceiling. Touching them will cause injury. Trap pits are often lined with them. Spikes can be electrically controlled and will extend/retract on a rising edge of an electric signal.
Entry.Translation: 木刺刺入 flesh。尖刺木板可以放置在地板、墙壁和天花板上。触碰它们会造成伤害。陷阱坑常用它们衬里。尖刺可以电动控制，并在电信号上升沿伸出/缩回。

Entry.Original: Workbench is a piece of workshop furniture made of wood. It is a very important item, because it allows you to craft items that require more than 2x2 crafting slots. All craftable items can be made on it, provided that you have the required materials.
Entry.Translation: 工作台是一件木制 workshop 家具。它是一个非常重要的物品，因为它允许你合成需要超过2x2合成槽的物品。所有可合成的物品都可以在上面制作，只要你有所需的材料。

Entry.Original: Writeable memory bank containing 256 4-bit words. The memory can be addressed using two 4-bit address lines placed on the left and right. If an address line is not connected, it's assumed to be zero. Value stored in the memory bank under the specified address can be read at the top output. Bottom input is used as a clock in a similar fashion to SR Latch. If the clock line is not connected, reads are immediate. To write to the memory bank, supply the value to be written on the back input (you must use wire-through-block). The write is triggered by setting clock input to a low voltage between 0.1 and 0.7 volts (a value of 0.8 and larger will trigger a read). The contents of memory block can be manually edited by tapping edit button when block is held in hand or looked at. Can be placed on any surface and rotated to desired orientation.
Entry.Translation: 可写存储库，包含256个4位字。可以使用左右两侧的两条4位地址线对存储器进行寻址。如果地址线未连接，则假定为零。存储在指定地址下的存储库中的值可以在顶部输出读取。底部输入用作时钟，类似于SR锁存器。如果时钟线未连接，则立即读取。要写入存储库，请在背面输入提供要写入的值（必须使用导线穿过方块）。通过将时钟输入设置为0.1至0.7伏的低电压来触发写入（0.8及更高值将触发读取）。当手持或看着存储块时，可以通过点击编辑按钮手动编辑其内容。可放置在任何表面上并旋转到所需方向。

Entry.Original: Put together white and black planks to make a shooting target.
Entry.Translation: 将白色和黑色木板组合在一起制作射击靶子。
挖掘韧性： 爆炸韧性：

Entry.Original: Digging Resilience: Explosion Resilience: Projectile Power: Experience Orbs:
Entry.Translation: Digging Resilience: Explosion Resilience: Projectile Power: Experience Orbs:

Entry.Original: Fuel Value: Is Stackable: Is Flammable: Digging Method:
Entry.Translation: Fuel Value: Is Stackable: Is Flammable: Digging Method:

Entry.Original: Is Stackable: Is Flammable: Digging Method:
Entry.Translation: 可堆叠： 可燃： 挖掘方法：
是（最多40） 是 砍伐

Entry.Original: Male Level 1 No Sickness No Flu Creative Mode
Entry.Translation: Male Level 1 No Sickness No Flu Creative Mode

Entry.Original: Male Level 1 100% Stamina No Sickness Not Vomiting No Flu Not Coughing
Entry.Translation: Male Level 1 100% Stamina No Sickness Not Vomiting No Flu Not Coughing

Entry.Original: Male Level 1 100% Stamina No Sickness Not Vomiting No Flu Not Coughing Creative Mode
Entry.Translation: Male Level 1 100% Stamina No Sickness Not Vomiting No Flu Not Coughing Creative Mode

Entry.Original:
Health bar is displayed in the game screen as little hearts. It is the amount of life left in the player. When it drops to zero, the player dies.
It slowly replenishes when player is not hungry, it replenishes faster when sleeping. Be careful when your health is low, even a slight injury may kill you.
When the player is sick, the hearts become dirty green. Do not eat dodgy food to avoid sickness. When the player has flu, the hearts become blue. Do not get cold for prolonged periods to avoid getting flu.
Entry.Translation:
Health bar is displayed in the game screen as little hearts. It is the amount of life left in the player. When it drops to zero, the player dies.
It slowly replenishes when player is not hungry, it replenishes faster when sleeping. Be careful when your health is low, even a slight injury may kill you.
When the player is sick, the hearts become dirty green. Do not eat dodgy food to avoid sickness. When the player has flu, the hearts become blue. Do not get cold for prolonged periods to avoid getting flu.

Entry.Original:
Hunger bar is displayed in the game screen as little fishes. If you don't eat for a long time, your character will start complaining about it and eventually losing health, until you die. In addition to that, if you're hungry, you don't regenerate health.
To eat, drag an edible item onto the player in the body panel. Your character will inform you whether you are still hungry.
Food can be obtained from many sources in the game. The obvious one is hunting edible animals, such as cows, birds and wildboars. Keep in mind that hunting may be dangerous, and the supply of animals will quickly dry up in nearby areas, forcing you to search further.
An alternative to hunting is farming. Farming lets you create a sustainable source of food, although it may require lots of preparatory work and further maintenance.
Entry.Translation:
Hunger bar is displayed in the game screen as little fishes. If you don't eat for a long time, your character will start complaining about it and eventually losing health, until you die. In addition to that, if you're hungry, you don't regenerate health.
To eat, drag an edible item onto the player in the body panel. Your character will inform you whether you are still hungry.
Food can be obtained from many sources in the game. The obvious one is hunting edible animals, such as cows, birds and wildboars. Keep in mind that hunting may be dangerous, and the supply of animals will quickly dry up in nearby areas, forcing you to search further.
An alternative to hunting is farming. Farming lets you create a sustainable source of food, although it may require lots of preparatory work and further maintenance.

Entry.Original:
Sleeping will help restore your health and pass the boring night hours when it's too dark or dangerous to work.
Even if you are not hurt, you still need to sleep from time to time. If you neglect it, your character will start to have short blackouts. If you keep active despite this warning, the blackouts will get longer and eventually you will lose consciousness. Losing consciousness is very dangerous, because predatory animals will quickly smell you and feast on your unguarded flesh.
Although you don't need a bed, you can only sleep in a cosy and comfortable place. The ground cannot be too hard and the area cannot be too exposed to the elements, or wet.
Your respawn point is set to a place where you last slept. To sleep, open the body screen and press a little sleeping button.
Note: Sleeping is disabled in the demo.
Entry.Translation:
Sleeping will help restore your health and pass the boring night hours when it's too dark or dangerous to work.
Even if you are not hurt, you still need to sleep from time to time. If you neglect it, your character will start to have short blackouts. If you keep active despite this warning, the blackouts will get longer and eventually you will lose consciousness. Losing consciousness is very dangerous, because predatory animals will quickly smell you and feast on your unguarded flesh.
Although you don't need a bed, you can only sleep in a cosy and comfortable place. The ground cannot be too hard and the area cannot be too exposed to the elements, or wet.
Your respawn point is set to a place where you last slept. To sleep, open the body screen and press a little sleeping button.
Note: Sleeping is disabled in the demo.

Entry.Original:
Stamina is the measure of tiredness of your character. When you perform a tiring action for a long time without break, you will tire and start panting.
When you are panting, your performance is lower than when you are rested. You will move and dig slower, and you will not be able to perform jumps.
Some of the actions that are tiring: running, jumping, swimming, digging, fighting.
It is very dangerous to get tired when you are in water, because you can't rest while swimming. Watch for early signs of panting, and get out of water immediately. When you get exhausted while in water, you will start drowning and die unless the shore is very near.
Be careful, it's easy to get tired when running away from dangerous animals.
Entry.Translation:
Stamina is the measure of tiredness of your character. When you perform a tiring action for a long time without break, you will tire and start panting.
When you are panting, your performance is lower than when you are rested. You will move and dig slower, and you will not be able to perform jumps.
Some of the actions that are tiring: running, jumping, swimming, digging, fighting.
It is very dangerous to get tired when you are in water, because you can't rest while swimming. Watch for early signs of panting, and get out of water immediately. When you get exhausted while in water, you will start drowning and die unless the shore is very near.
Be careful, it's easy to get tired when running away from dangerous animals.

Entry.Original:
Wearing clothing provides warmth in cold climates and armor protection during combat. You need heavy clothing to survive for any period of time in cold areas of the world.
The level of thermal insulation is measured in CLO units. For example, 0.0 CLO is naked body, 1.0 CLO is light clothing, 3.0 CLO is heavy insulation.
You can access clothing interface by using Clothing button. There are 4 clothing slots on your body: head, torso, legs and feet. Each slot can have multiple clothing items, layered one on top of each other. The effects of multiple clothing items combine.
Not everything can be worn on top of everything else, for example you will not be able to wear a t-shirt on top of a fur coat.
Wearing thick clothes in one slot while leaving another slot bare will not afford much insulation. It's imperative to cover entire body to really benefit from clothing. It's the thinnest piece of clothing that determines how much heat the character loses.
Entry.Translation:
Wearing clothing provides warmth in cold climates and armor protection during combat. You need heavy clothing to survive for any period of time in cold areas of the world.
The level of thermal insulation is measured in CLO units. For example, 0.0 CLO is naked body, 1.0 CLO is light clothing, 3.0 CLO is heavy insulation.
You can access clothing interface by using Clothing button. There are 4 clothing slots on your body: head, torso, legs and feet. Each slot can have multiple clothing items, layered one on top of each other. The effects of multiple clothing items combine.
Not everything can be worn on top of everything else, for example you will not be able to wear a t-shirt on top of a fur coat.
Wearing thick clothes in one slot while leaving another slot bare will not afford much insulation. It's imperative to cover entire body to really benefit from clothing. It's the thinnest piece of clothing that determines how much heat the character loses.

Entry.Original:
When you are out in the cold without proper clothes, your body temperature will drop. Your view will start to freeze over and you will start losing health. Find a warmer place or get near fire to warm and dry yourself. If you stay cold for a long time, you will start sneezing and may get flu.
Too much warmth will do you no good either, standing too close to a large fire will cause you to overheat.
Sheltered areas are warmer than outside. Plugging all the holes and locking doors will make a shelter warmer still. Even a small hole open to the elements will admit draughts and make a large difference to temperature. Make a fire inside your shelter to make it homely warm and allow you to take your clothes off.
Being wet dramatically increases your susceptibility to cold, find a warm place to dry yourself faster.
The best way to deal with cold is to wear multiple layers of thick, dry clothes. You need to cover your entire body, leaving feet or head unclothed will defeat most of the warming effect other clothes have. Clothes made of animal fur are best for keeping cold out.
Entry.Translation:
When you are out in the cold without proper clothes, your body temperature will drop. Your view will start to freeze over and you will start losing health. Find a warmer place or get near fire to warm and dry yourself. If you stay cold for a long time, you will start sneezing and may get flu.
Too much warmth will do you no good either, standing too close to a large fire will cause you to overheat.
Sheltered areas are warmer than outside. Plugging all the holes and locking doors will make a shelter warmer still. Even a small hole open to the elements will admit draughts and make a large difference to temperature. Make a fire inside your shelter to make it homely warm and allow you to take your clothes off.
Being wet dramatically increases your susceptibility to cold, find a warm place to dry yourself faster.
The best way to deal with cold is to wear multiple layers of thick, dry clothes. You need to cover your entire body, leaving feet or head unclothed will defeat most of the warming effect other clothes have. Clothes made of animal fur are best for keeping cold out.

Entry.Original:
Your character becomes more experienced over time. Experience is represented by little golden orbs that can be picked up. They appear when you mine minerals, harvest crops or hunt animals. Collect them.
If you gather enough experience, your character will advance to the next level. Your strength, speed and resilience will increase and your food needs will decrease. You will also be able to use more advanced tools, weapons and armor.
When you die and respawn, your level is reduced to a much lower value. It will take a lot of time to regain the lost experience.
Entry.Translation:
Your character becomes more experienced over time. Experience is represented by little golden orbs that can be picked up. They appear when you mine minerals, harvest crops or hunt animals. Collect them.
If you gather enough experience, your character will advance to the next level. Your strength, speed and resilience will increase and your food needs will decrease. You will also be able to use more advanced tools, weapons and armor.
When you die and respawn, your level is reduced to a much lower value. It will take a lot of time to regain the lost experience.

Entry.Original: Your character can get wet by being outside in the rain or by falling into water. Wetness heavily reduces insulation provided by clothing, so it's very easy to freeze in colder climates. Your character will dry faster in a warm place.
Entry.Translation: Your character can get wet by being outside in the rain or by falling into water. Wetness heavily reduces insulation provided by clothing, so it's very easy to freeze in colder climates. Your character will dry faster in a warm place.

Entry.Original: Affects damage received from attacks, falls, fire, and asphyxiation.
Entry.Translation: Affects damage received from attacks, falls, fire, and asphyxiation.

Entry.Original: Affects how quickly eaten food is depleted.
Entry.Translation: Affects how quickly eaten food is depleted.

Entry.Original: Affects melee attack power, digging speed, throwing range, and bow range.
Entry.Translation: Affects melee attack power, digging speed, throwing range, and bow range.

Entry.Original: Affects movement speed on foot, swimming speed, jump height and stamina regeneration.
Entry.Translation: Affects movement speed on foot, swimming speed, jump height and stamina regeneration.
使用的最简单游戏模式：

Entry.Original: Tap on labels for more information
Entry.Translation: 点击标签获取更多信息

Entry.Original: You must be on dry land
Entry.Translation: 你必须在干燥的陆地上

Entry.Original: Your items will remain for a short time at the place of death.
Entry.Translation: 你的物品会在死亡地点短暂保留。

Entry.Original: x 1.00 x 1.00 x 1.00 x 1.00 x Infinity
Entry.Translation: x 1.00 x 1.00 x 1.00 x 1.00 x Infinity

Entry.Original: Leave blank for a random seed

Use the touchpad at the bottom left side of the screen to move. Tap it once to jump. This can also be configured to use directional buttons instead of the pad.
Use the touchpad at the bottom right side of the screen to look around. Tap it once to jump. You can also drag your finger across any area of the screen to look.
You can tweak control scheme of the game in the Controls and Sensitivity settings. Experiment with various options, for example you may find you prefer buttons to touchpads, or split touch with crosshair to regular controls. Controlling a first person game on a small touchscreen may look difficult, but once you get the hang of it, it is no different than using a gamepad or a mouse. Because you can touch any part of the screen at any time, some actions like block digging or placement may even be easier.
Some cheap or old devices have low quality touch screens or buggy touch drivers. They might intermittently drop active touch points, or mix them up if touched in more than one point at once. These are best avoided as playing on them is extremely frustrating.
